## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Verification

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm pack --dry-run`
- [ ] `npm run vibeguard:dist -- check --quiet --format json`

## Security and Compatibility

- [ ] No secrets, private source, generated reports, or local paths are committed.
- [ ] User-visible CLI, config, rule, schema, or report changes are documented.
- [ ] Any new network behavior is opt-in or clearly documented.
